title: Kuzan’s Place Among Blackbeard’s Crew
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Kuzan, Bepo, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.
scene: The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hibari- San?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hibar!!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Kuzan...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: K- Kuzan- San?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing?! Please hurry and unfreeze Hibari-San!

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: Yeah! It's aokiji!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Let's year it for Captain Kuzan!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Show Yem, Kuzan- Chan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a bad look if Koby escapes...

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: WHILE TEACH IS AWAY...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two years ago, Akainu and Aokui had a fierce duel...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Over the fleet Admiral position. Roughly a year after that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Woah! What the hell hap- pened?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Forget that, it's blackbeard, let's get the hell out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ON A CERTAIN ISLAND IN THE NEW WORLD...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gyaaaa Aaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's no point askin' who did it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's only one person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...on the stinkin' planet capable of this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There you are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aokj!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why'd ya hafta freeze all my buddies out there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You better undo it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Man, you're loud...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd think twice about using your quake-quake powers, you'll shatter those buddies of yours.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you know how your men are. You're their captain, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm pretty heartbroken right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really think I'm the one who picked this fight?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...besides, you must've heard what happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And guess who's to blame for my foul mood?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: You're one crazy sonuva bitch. ice Pop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Look who's talking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wish we had more 300ze here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what did that Akainu Prick say after that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'To think we came up together, and now we gotta kill each other...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It makes my blood boil...' then I said:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...that'll be the magma!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you can see, I'm down a leg thanks to him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I HAVE TO USE MY ICE TO REPLACE IT.

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: G'AAAH!! You Admirals sure don't fool around!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What about Akainu? Did you tear off an arm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, but I'm sure he's pretty banged up all over.

summary: This part advances the Winner Island and Hachinosu Fallout through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
